summary: Last 7 days: 23 clicks / 1,891 impressions / 1.2% CTR / avg position 7.4 across 56 queries. Brand demand exists, but non-branded discovery is under-converting. Highest-volume opportunity is Chinese-language Kona coffee informational demand with strong ranking (positions ~6-9) but 0% CTR.
top_opportunities: Improve CTR for high-impression Chinese queries currently at positions 6-9 with zero clicks (e.g., 夏威夷科纳咖啡风味: 890 impressions; 夏威夷科纳适合冲美式吗: 497; 夏威夷科纳咖啡 介绍: 170).
Boost local-intent conversion for 'donuts near me' (18 impressions, position 9.3, 0 clicks) and related 'near me' coffee terms.
Strengthen /en/about-kona-coffee (position 23.1) with clearer search-intent headings, internal links, and FAQ schema.
Consolidate duplicate home URL variants (http://www.../en and https://www.../en) to reduce signal dilution and improve canonical consistency.
technical_fixes: URGENT: Replace all live metadata/text mentioning 'Grand Opening Feb 25' with 'Grand Opening: Early March 2026' (live meta description still says Feb 25).
Fix GSC device/country position pipeline fields showing 0 to ensure accurate segmentation reporting.
Reduce 71 HTML validation errors and 106 warnings from automated validator output.
Add missing security headers: HSTS, CSP, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy.
Ensure schema markup is valid JSON-LD blocks in rendered HTML (validator detected types but JSON-LD script count returned 0).
content_actions: Create Chinese and Korean FAQ snippets targeting current high-impression informational queries; include concise answer boxes and internal links to menu/location.
Add local landing copy for Waikiki intent: 'donuts near Waikiki Beach', 'Kona coffee near me in Waikiki', and walking-distance/location modifiers.
Refresh homepage and key pages with opening status language aligned to early March 2026 and clear CTA for opening updates.
Expand /en/menu and /en/about-kona-coffee with structured FAQ sections to capture long-tail question queries.
local_seo_actions: Align NAP + opening date across website metadata, Google Business Profile, and social bios to avoid trust/relevance conflicts.
Publish 3-5 localized posts before opening focused on Waikiki foot traffic, beach proximity, and morning coffee/donut intent.
Add multilingual location snippets (EN/KO/ZH/JA) with map/parking/walking-time details.
Track and prioritize US, KR, and JP query clusters since impressions indicate multilingual demand beyond branded terms.
priority_next_7_days: Day 1: Ship urgent metadata fix for Feb 25 references on live site and redeploy.
Day 1-2: Add canonical normalization (force https + preferred www/non-www strategy) and verify in GSC URL Inspection.
Day 2-3: Publish multilingual FAQ updates for top Chinese/Korean informational queries.
Day 3-4: Improve /en/about-kona-coffee on-page structure (H2s, intent match, internal links, FAQ schema).
Day 4-5: Implement security headers and re-run observatory check.
Day 5-7: Re-run PageSpeed and GSC snapshot; compare CTR lift on targeted query set.
